items.briefing:
Australian businesses are being urged to strengthen their AI governance frameworks, with Cloudera warning local firms that poorly managed AI systems create significant security and compliance risks. Separately, a newly discovered flaw in the Claude AI platform can automatically pass malicious instructions through AI agents without user awareness — a reminder that AI tools themselves can be exploited.

A global trend worth noting: ransomware attackers are increasingly using stolen login credentials rather than software vulnerabilities to break into networks. Review who has access to your systems and enable multi-factor authentication on all accounts where possible.
